(416) MOTHER NOT PRESENT, FATHER NOT PRESENT, ADA=ITAYA. PER MOVING PAPERS, SABIR ALI HUSSAIN IS FOUND TO BE THE FATHER OF JERIMISHA HUSSAIN, DOB 6/26/83. A JUDGMENT
OF PATERNITY IS TO BE ENTERED. WELFARE REIMBURSEMENT FOR PERIOD OF 12/95 TO THE PRESENT IS SET AT $1504.00 AND ENFORCEMENT IS STAYED. COURT ORDERS
FY DA AND COURT WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ANY CHANGE OF EMPLOYMENT/RESIDENCE/INCOME OR HEALTH INSURANCE. COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION TO COMMENCE SUPPORT THE
MONTH AFTER THE LIABLE PARENT BECOMES EMPLOYED. (GARGANO)  PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LOIS JONES, CSR# 3689. NS JURISDICTION TO COMMENCE SUPPORT THE
